title: main: fix rootless mode
body:
the args argument is always an empty slice, so it breaks the code for
detecting if we need a new user namespace.  Use directly os.Args[1:].

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: hm.. this will probably not work when there are options, still working on it

it will still create a userns in the case of "buildah --debug version" where "buildah version" doesn't.

@baude do you know why the args is empty?
fixed now in the new version :arrow_up:
